title: ARGENTUM attestation submission — challenge
description: A submitter has registered an attestation claiming that agentId={{agentId}} performed an action with hash={{actionHash}}. A challenger disputes that this attestation is valid. Evaluate whether the attestation faithfully represents the action described in evidenceURI.
question: Should the attestation be accepted as valid?

answers.title: Yes, accept the attestation
answers.description: Evidence supports that agentId={{agentId}} performed the claimed action.

answers.title: No, reject the attestation
answers.description: Evidence does NOT support the claim, or the claim is misleading/false.
